# CurrentBalance.availableAndBooked(available:booked:)

**Case**

Both available and booked balances are present.

## Declaration

```swift
case availableAndBooked(available: Balance, booked: Balance)
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **CurrentBalance.available(_:)**: Only the available balance is present.
- **CurrentBalance.booked(_:)**: Only the booked balance is present.

items.description: Only the available balance is present.
